name: license-attribution sweep emits a structured per-component license record for downstream parsing
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/license-attribution.sh" --emit json --out licenses.json 2>err.txt && [ -f licenses.json ] && node -e "const a=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('licenses.json','utf8'));if(!Array.isArray(a))process.exit(1);" && echo ok 1>&2
